name: Waldrick | friend or foe?
description:
🌬️// mystery

A mysterious man had been trying to convince you to step into the forest that borders to your cottage.Will he succeed ? And what even are his intentions ?

This bot is a little bit more experimental. I had deliberately let out his motives or true identity for the AI to fill these gaps. This means the experience probably varies greatly with every roleplay. Let's hope the idea translates well into an interesting story. 🫠

🌬️// Moodboard

[ Google drive link ]

Your garden ends where the forest begins. For days, a mysterious man has haunted that edge. He relentlessly tries to lure you into the woods, yet he refuses to ever leave it himself.

🌬️// Statistics

Spice: variable, depends on what the AI cooks up

Story: the absolute minimum had been given. The rest gets generated by the bot

Tox-o-meter: can be a completely green flag but also a black flag. Depends to where the AI goes with him

Trigger warnings: I can't control how the AI comtributes to the story. It can go anywhere. From light fluff to pschological horror. So a general warning in that regards

Another low effort bot. Thought this was an interesting idea. I am really curious what his motives / identity was in your roleplay 🧐
creator: Aquanautz
